title: Zoey's Gizmos
description: A collection of various random ideas I had.
body:
# Zoey's Gizmos
This mod is a place for my creativity to roam, where I can throw in any random ideas i feel like making
If this mod breaks, report it [here!](https://discord.gg/46yEVu9gQH)
## Contains
### A rubber duck. It's a cute duck you should craft one!
![A rubber duck in a bath.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0fa3fa0df8dfd26f732f76ae5b138b4281cc5d7.png)
### A Destruction Catalyst, inspired by Equivilent Exchange!
Shift right click to charge, right click to fire.
![A destruction catalyst poof over a 3x3x12 hole in grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb715ce953cba8496acebb5cb720717f91503509.png)
### Collectable cards!
You can find a card pack in some village chests, open it up and try to collect them all!
![A player inventory with every otherworld card and overworld set pack ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28e0f2c4ae6cbe183308c1f8e253125735eccaa3.png)
### A magic themed item transport system!
Connect nodes to the brain using a tuning wand. Click on nodes to flip them between pull from chests(blue) and push into chests(orange).
![An example set-up of the item transport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf1af77f316d3b6d0137078f8a85fa4654e0e99.png)

[Here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/caits-curiosities) is the version of this mod hosted on CurseForge.

[Here](https://github.com/caittastic/CaitsCuriosities) is the mod's github repository.

This mod is proudly made by a member of the LGBT community. Trans rights are human rights🏳️‍⚧️
